elements.title: Aitape Skull
elements.contents: ... that the Aitape Skull (pictured) may be part of the remains of the oldest known tsunami victim?

elements.title: Kim Chwajin
elements.contents: ... that Kim Chwajin was imprisoned for three years for freeing his family's slaves?

elements.title: CDG-2
elements.contents: ... that the galaxy CDG-2 is over 99.9% dark matter, one of the highest proportions discovered?

elements.title: his autobiography
elements.contents: ... that in his autobiography, openly gay footballer Thomas Hitzlsperger criticises high-profile players for promoting gay rights while working in countries where homosexuality is illegal?

elements.title: Mary Theresa Simpson
elements.contents: ... that it took 61 years to identify the killer of Mary Theresa Simpson?

elements.title: fifth studio album
elements.contents: ... that, although Self's fifth studio album was cancelled, its songs were still used in television commercials?

elements.title: LeShun Daniels Sr.
elements.contents: ... that football player LeShun Daniels Sr. and his best friend were teammates in junior high school, high school, college, and the NFL?

elements.title: 2023 San Pedro de la Paz railway accident
elements.contents: ... that two victims of the 2023 San Pedro de la Paz railway accident worked at a school that had previously lost two other teachers in a train collision?

elements.title: Toby Fox
elements.contents: ... that Toby Fox's video game Undertale was given to Pope Francis?
